calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for filing of the Stipulation for Judgment and Judgment.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
William McNulty, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Collection Corp.
No appearance by the Defendant: Danilo G. Manalang.
Mr. McNulty presented a Stipulation for Judgment signed by the parties and requested for a Judgment pursuant to Stipulation, in which the Court reviewed and granted, Judgment pursuant to stipulation signed. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

William T. McNulty, Jr. appeared for plaintiff United Collection Corporation.
James Bell, Zone Maintenance Manager for the Hertz Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
Michael Heath, Esq., appeared for defendant Danilo G. Manalang, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 24, 20088.

The Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was read into the record by Mr. McNulty. In accordance with said agreement defendant Danilo G. Manalang shall play plaintiff United Collection Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $6,387.l48.
Prejudgment Interest - To Be Determined.
Attorney's Fees - $975.00.
Costs - $235.00.

The Judgment is STAYED provided defendant Danilo G. Manalang makes installment payments to plaintiff United Collection Corporation in the amount of $300.00 per, due the 15th of each, commencing July 15, 2008, until the balance is paid in full.

In the event defendant fails to make the monthly payments, default shall be entered after a ten day grace period, and the stay shall be lifted.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare a proposed judgment and submit it to opposing counsel for review no later than July 21, 2008.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
